# Integrate Claude

> Integrate Claude is a specialist consultancy that helps businesses adopt Anthropic's Claude AI across their organization. We handle the full integration lifecycle: educating teams to AI fluency, designing workflows, engineering prompts and Projects, and building custom web apps and SaaS tools powered by Claude.

## What We Do

- **Education & AI Fluency** — Team training programs that move organizations from casual Claude usage to systematic, high-leverage AI adoption.
- **Workflow Integration** — Audit, design, and implement Claude into existing business processes across sales, marketing, finance, HR, operations, and more.
- **Prompting & Projects** — Expert prompt engineering, Claude Projects setup, and system prompt design for consistent, production-grade outputs.
- **Custom Web Apps & SaaS** — We build Claude-powered applications: internal tools, client-facing products, and SaaS features powered by the Anthropic API.
- **Ongoing Partnership** — Retained advisory and implementation support as your Claude usage scales.

## Prompt Library

We maintain the largest free Claude prompt library organized by business function. Each prompt is production-tested with full anatomy: use case context, the prompt, variable annotations, example input/output, tips, and structured metadata.

Library URL: https://integrateclaude.com/prompts

Functions covered:
- Sales (SDR, AE, Sales Enablement, Sales Ops, Customer Success)
- Marketing (Content, Brand, Performance, Demand Gen, Product Marketing, Lifecycle, SEO)
- Customer Service (Support, CX Research, Escalations)
- Finance (FP&A, Accounting, Treasury, Investor Relations)
- HR & People (Recruiting, L&D, People Ops, Internal Comms)
- Operations (Ops Management, Project Management, Vendor Management)
- Product (Product Management, User Research, Product Design)
- Engineering (Coding, Code Review, Documentation, Architecture)
- Legal (Contracts, Compliance, IP)
- Executive (Strategy, Comms, Board Prep)

## Licensing

All prompts in the library are published under CC-BY 4.0. You may use, adapt, and redistribute them with attribution to integrateclaude.com.

Website: https://integrateclaude.com
